title: Forge config.toml
description: Schema for Forge's config.toml (the layered configuration loaded from ~/.config/forge/config.toml and ./.forge/config.toml). Covers the stable, documented top-level sections; partially-modelled sections allow additional properties for forward compatibility. Hand-authored from crates/forge-config — see docs/STABILITY.md for the compatibility policy.

self_mcp.description: Run a sub-Forge session as an MCP server so the agent can call forge_chat / forge_assay as native tools. Off by default.

mesh.description: Model Mesh: rule-based task routing across providers/models (ADR-0006).

mcp.description: External MCP servers Forge connects to as a client.

hooks.description: Pre/post tool-use and lifecycle shell hooks. Each entry runs a command around a matching event.

lsp.description: LSP-backed live diagnostics fed back into the turn after edits. Off = inert.

autofix.description: Auto-lint / auto-test self-healing loop after edits. Off = inert.

assay.description: Assay-gated auto-review of write turns before they finish. Off = inert.

tui.description: Interactive TUI rendering (inline vs. full-screen alternate-screen mode).

local.description: Local-LLM runtime (Ollama): which model to auto-start and whether to start it with Forge.

statusline.description: Customizable statusline layout (left / center / right widget segments).

PermissionMode.description: Default permission posture for new sessions (ADR-0008). Canonical values plus accepted aliases.

PermissionsConfig.description: Fine-grained allow/ask/deny rules layered on top of permission_mode.

RuleConfig.description: One rule block: a tool plus exactly one of allow/ask/deny (string or list of glob-ish patterns).

StringOrArray.description: A single pattern or a list of patterns.

inject.description: Auto-inject relevant code into each turn.

explain_errors.description: On a failed shell command, make one cheap trivial-tier model call to explain the likely cause + fix.

sandbox.description: Opt-in Linux Landlock sandbox confining filesystem writes to cwd + temp. No-op on macOS/Windows.

sandbox_writable.description: Extra writable paths when sandbox = true. Absolute, or resolved against cwd.

matcher.description: Tool-name filter for pre/post_tool_use: absent or "*" = every tool; else a comma-separated list of exact tool names.

command.description: Shell command line; receives event data as JSON on stdin.

timeout_secs.description: Kill the hook after this many seconds.

RecapConfig.description: Per-turn one-line AI recap shown in scrollback after each completed turn.

UpdateConfig.description: Startup update check against GitHub releases (throttled to once a day).
